title: fix: update cloudflare vite plugin to fix dev server hang
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unstuck the dev server
gist.blurb: Updated our Cloudflare Vite plugin so the local dev server actually starts instead of hanging out in the void.
gist.summary: Updated Vite and Cloudflare Wrangler dependencies to resolve an issue where the local development server would hang indefinitely.
gist.impact: Developers can now run the local dev environment without the server silently failing to start.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot fixing a jammed gear in a retro server, with a monitor robot cheering as a loading bar finally completes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny wrench to fix a glowing retro server rack. A chunky monitor robot nearby cheers as a loading bar on its screen finally reaches 100%. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
